publishedAbstract: Starting with OCS-3.11.4, we are increasing the current max limit on the number of PV's in a 3 nodes cluster from 1000 to 2000. Although we are not making it default, default limit still exist at 1000 but the users can tune their cluster using this article and go beyond 1000(up to 2000).
publishedTitle: How to change the default PVS limit in Openshift Container Storage
